result.stdout:
Description:
  a tool to build and install localize intelliSense file
  eg:
  show Microsoft.NETCore.App for net6.0 contains 'threading' xml files:
  islocalizer show refs -p Microsoft.NETCore.App -m net6.0 -f threading
  
  build Microsoft.AspNetCore.App for net6.0 's localize intelliSense file:
  islocalizer build -p Microsoft.AspNetCore.App -m net6.0
  
  install the builded files (may need run as administrator):
  islocalizer install
  
  clear the build caches:
  islocalizer clear cache
  
  --------------------------------------------
  
  before building on your own, you can use the following command to try installing the package through github:
  islocalizer install auto
  
  append the argument -h at the end of the command to view the help of the command. eg：
  islocalizer install auto -h
  islocalizer cache -h
  
  if that doesn't work. try use command 'dotnet tool update -g islocalizer' to update this tool and try again.
  
  More info at: https://github.com/stratosblue/IntelliSenseLocalizer

Usage:
  islocalizer [command] [options]

Options:
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install <source>                     install the localized intellisense file. (from local or online.)
  uninstall <moniker> <locale>         uninstall the localized intellisense file. []
  show                                 query and show more installed SDK info.
  build                                build the localized intellisense file.
  clear <All|Build|Cache|Logs|Output>  clear the download or cache files.
  clean                                clean the dangling ref folders.
  translate                            translate the target xml file to target locales.

commands.payload:
Description:
  a tool to build and install localize intelliSense file
  eg:
  show Microsoft.NETCore.App for net6.0 contains 'threading' xml files:
  islocalizer show refs -p Microsoft.NETCore.App -m net6.0 -f threading
  
  build Microsoft.AspNetCore.App for net6.0 's localize intelliSense file:
  islocalizer build -p Microsoft.AspNetCore.App -m net6.0
  
  install the builded files (may need run as administrator):
  islocalizer install
  
  clear the build caches:
  islocalizer clear cache
  
  --------------------------------------------
  
  before building on your own, you can use the following command to try installing the package through github:
  islocalizer install auto
  
  append the argument -h at the end of the command to view the help of the command. eg：
  islocalizer install auto -h
  islocalizer cache -h
  
  if that doesn't work. try use command 'dotnet tool update -g islocalizer' to update this tool and try again.
  
  More info at: https://github.com/stratosblue/IntelliSenseLocalizer

Usage:
  islocalizer [command] [options]

Options:
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  --version                     Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

Commands:
  install <source>                     install the localized intellisense file. (from local or online.)
  uninstall <moniker> <locale>         uninstall the localized intellisense file. []
  show                                 query and show more installed SDK info.
  build                                build the localized intellisense file.
  clear <All|Build|Cache|Logs|Output>  clear the download or cache files.
  clean                                clean the dangling ref folders.
  translate                            translate the target xml file to target locales.

result.stdout:
Description:
  build the localized intellisense file.

Usage:
  islocalizer build [options]

Options:
  -p, --pack <pack>                                              select application pack. eg: "Microsoft.AspNetCore.App". process all pack default..
  -m, --moniker <moniker>                                        select .net moniker. eg: "net6.0". default is all of installed framework.
  -l, --locale <locale>                                          select locale. eg: "zh-cn". use the system culture info default. []
  -cc, --content-compare <Default|LocaleFirst|None|OriginFirst>  set the content compare type. [default: OriginFirst]
  -sl, --separate-line <separate-line>                           the separate line between origin and locale content. (effective only use bilingual comparison)
  -o, --output <output>                                          set the output path. [default: /tmp/IntelliSenseLocalizer/output]
  -pc, --parallel-count <parallel-count>                         set the parallel process count. large value will let MS block your ip fast. [default: 2]
  -nc, --no-cache                                                set not use existed local page cache. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>                                   set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                                              Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -l, --locale <locale>                                          select locale. eg: "zh-cn". use the system culture info default. []
  -cc, --content-compare <Default|LocaleFirst|None|OriginFirst>  set the content compare type. [default: OriginFirst]
  -sl, --separate-line <separate-line>                           the separate line between origin and locale content. (effective only use bilingual comparison)
  -o, --output <output>                                          set the output path. [default: /tmp/IntelliSenseLocalizer/output]
  -pc, --parallel-count <parallel-count>                         set the parallel process count. large value will let MS block your ip fast. [default: 2]
  -nc, --no-cache                                                set not use existed local page cache. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>                                   set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                                              Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  install the localized intellisense file. (from local or online.)

Usage:
  islocalizer install <source> [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  set the install source file(local or http url).

Options:
  -t, --target <target>               set the install target sdk directory. [default: /usr/share/dotnet/sdk]
  -ctn, --copy-to-nuget-global-cache  copy the file to the same name package in the Nuget global cache. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>        set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                   Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information


Commands:
  auto  try install the localized IntelliSense archive from nuget.org.

commands.payload:
Description:
  install the localized intellisense file. (from local or online.)

Usage:
  islocalizer install <source> [command] [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  set the install source file(local or http url).

Options:
  -t, --target <target>               set the install target sdk directory. [default: /usr/share/dotnet/sdk]
  -ctn, --copy-to-nuget-global-cache  copy the file to the same name package in the Nuget global cache. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>        set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                   Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information


Commands:
  auto  try install the localized IntelliSense archive from nuget.org.

result.stdout:
Description:
  try install the localized IntelliSense archive from nuget.org.

Usage:
  islocalizer install <source> auto [options]

Arguments:
  <source>  set the install source file(local or http url).

Options:
  -t, --target <target>                                          set the install target sdk directory. [default: /usr/share/dotnet/sdk]
  -m, --moniker <moniker>                                        select .net moniker. eg: "net6.0". default is the installed latest version.(use ; between multiple values)
  -l, --locale <locale>                                          select locale. eg: "zh-cn". copy all default. []
  -cc, --content-compare <Default|LocaleFirst|None|OriginFirst>  set the content compare type. [default: None]
  -ctn, --copy-to-nuget-global-cache                             copy the file to the same name package in the Nuget global cache. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>                                   set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                                              Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Arguments:

Options:
  -t, --target <target>                                          set the install target sdk directory. [default: /usr/share/dotnet/sdk]
  -m, --moniker <moniker>                                        select .net moniker. eg: "net6.0". default is the installed latest version.(use ; between multiple values)
  -l, --locale <locale>                                          select locale. eg: "zh-cn". copy all default. []
  -cc, --content-compare <Default|LocaleFirst|None|OriginFirst>  set the content compare type. [default: None]
  -ctn, --copy-to-nuget-global-cache                             copy the file to the same name package in the Nuget global cache. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>                                   set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                                              Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  query and show more installed SDK info.

Usage:
  islocalizer show [command] [options]

Options:
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

Commands:
  packs  list all installed SDK‘s pack.
  refs   list all installed SDK‘s pack refs file.

  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.

result.stdout:
Description:
  list all installed SDK‘s pack.

Usage:
  islocalizer show packs [options]

Options:
  -f, --filter <filter>         a regex string for filter result.
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  list all installed SDK‘s pack refs file.

Usage:
  islocalizer show refs [options]

Options:
  -p, --pack <pack>             a regex string for filter application pack name in result.
  -m, --moniker <moniker>       a regex string for filter .net moniker in result.
  -f, --filter <filter>         a regex string for filter result.
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

  -m, --moniker <moniker>       a regex string for filter .net moniker in result.
  -f, --filter <filter>         a regex string for filter result.
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  translate the target xml file to target locales.

Usage:
  islocalizer translate [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>                                              the target xml file.
  -s, --server <server>                                          the translate server endpoint address.
  -fl, --from-locale <from-locale>                               specify the source xml locale. [default: en-us]
  -tl, --target-locales <target-locales>                         the trasnlate traget locales. (use ; between multiple values) []
  -cc, --content-compare <Default|LocaleFirst|None|OriginFirst>  set the content compare type. [default: OriginFirst]
  -sl, --separate-line <separate-line>                           the separate line between origin and locale content. (effective only use bilingual comparison)
  -o, --output <output>                                          the output root directory. the target locales will has a subdirectory at there. []
  -pc, --parallel-count <parallel-count>                         set the parallel process count. large value will let MS block your ip fast. [default: 2]
  -p, --patch                                                    set whether the current mode is patch mode. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>                                   set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                                              Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  translate the target xml file to target locales.

Usage:
  islocalizer translate [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>                                              the target xml file.
  -s, --server <server>                                          the translate server endpoint address.
  -fl, --from-locale <from-locale>                               specify the source xml locale. [default: en-us]
  -tl, --target-locales <target-locales>                         the trasnlate traget locales. (use ; between multiple values) []
  -cc, --content-compare <Default|LocaleFirst|None|OriginFirst>  set the content compare type. [default: OriginFirst]
  -sl, --separate-line <separate-line>                           the separate line between origin and locale content. (effective only use bilingual comparison)
  -o, --output <output>                                          the output root directory. the target locales will has a subdirectory at there. []
  -pc, --parallel-count <parallel-count>                         set the parallel process count. large value will let MS block your ip fast. [default: 2]
  -p, --patch                                                    set whether the current mode is patch mode. [default: False]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>                                   set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>                                              Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  uninstall the localized intellisense file.

Usage:
  islocalizer uninstall <moniker> [<locale>] [options]

Arguments:
  <moniker>  set the framework moniker. eg: "net6.0"
  <locale>   select locale. eg: "zh-cn". []

Options:
  -t, --target <target>         set the uninstall target sdk directory. [default: /usr/share/dotnet/sdk]
  -ll, --log-level <log-level>  set the log level from 0 - 5 .
  --custom <custom>             Custom addon options.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
